transforms.code:
out = []
	for v in (value or []):
		v = v or {}
		vnum = v.get('VersionNumber', 0)
		status = v.get('Status') or ''
		effDisp = v.get('effectiveFromDisplay') or ''
		label = 'v' + str(vnum) + ' — ' + status
		if effDisp:
			label = label + ' (Eff ' + effDisp + ')'
		out.append({'label': label, 'value': v.get('Id')})
	return out

config.expression: if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Published", "badge badge-published", if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Draft", "badge badge-warn", if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Deprecated", "badge badge-muted", "")))

props.text: No BOM versions yet. Click + New Version to create the first draft.

customMethods.name: onItemChanged
loadActiveVersion
_emptyBom
_cloneBundle
customMethods.script:
b = dict(bundle or {})
	lines = []
	for ln in (bundle or {}).get("lines", []) or []:
		lines.append(dict(ln))
	b["lines"] = lines
	return b

customMethods.name: handleNewVersion
customMethods.script:
itemId = self.view.params.value
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.Bom.handleCreateOrCloneVersion(itemId)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, "New draft version created")
	if not (result and result.get("Status")):
		return
	newId = result.get("NewId")
	self.refreshVersionList()
	if not newId:
		return
	self.view.custom.activeVersionId = newId
	bundle = BlueRidge.Parts.Bom.getOneFull(newId)
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": bundle, "editDraft": self._cloneBundle(bundle)}

customMethods.name: handleSaveDraft
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	bomId = draft.get("id")
	if not bomId:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No draft selected", "Cannot save: no draft BOM is currently active.", "warning")
		return
	effDisplay = draft.get("effectiveFromDisplay") or ""
	effDisplay = effDisplay.strip() if isinstance(effDisplay, basestring) else effDisplay
	if not effDisplay:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Effective From required", "Enter an effective date before saving.", "warning")
		return
	lines = draft.get("lines") or []
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.Bom.handleSaveDraft(bomId, effDisplay, lines)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, "BOM draft saved")
	if result and result.get("Status"):
		self.refreshVersionList()
		self.loadActiveVersion()

customMethods.name: handlePublish
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	bomId = draft.get("id")
	if not bomId:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No draft selected", "Cannot publish: no draft BOM is currently active.", "warning")
		return
	effDisplay = draft.get("effectiveFromDisplay") or ""
	effDisplay = effDisplay.strip() if isinstance(effDisplay, basestring) else effDisplay
	if not effDisplay:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Effective From required", "Enter an effective date before publishing.", "warning")
		return
	lines = draft.get("lines") or []
	if not lines:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("At least one line required", "Add at least one component before publishing.", "warning")
		return
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.Bom.handlePublish(bomId, effDisplay, lines)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, "BOM published")
	if result and result.get("Status"):
		self.refreshVersionList()
		self.loadActiveVersion()

customMethods.name: requestPublish
openDeprecateConfirm
customMethods.script:
sel = self.view.custom.state.selected or {}
	bomId = sel.get("id")
	ver = sel.get("versionNumber")
	if not bomId:
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title":        "Deprecate BOM",
			"message":      "Deprecate v" + str(ver) + "? This retires the version from production. Existing Work Orders are unaffected.",
			"confirmLabel": "Deprecate",
			"cancelLabel":  "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "bomConfirmDeprecateResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: openDiscardDraftConfirm
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	bomId = draft.get("id")
	if not bomId:
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title":        "Discard Draft",
			"message":      "Discard this draft and all unsaved edits? This cannot be undone.",
			"confirmLabel": "Discard",
			"cancelLabel":  "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "bomConfirmDiscardResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: handleAddComponent
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	lines = list(draft.get("lines") or [])
	lines.append(BlueRidge.Parts.Bom.emptyLine())
	draft["lines"] = lines
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _swapLines
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	lines = list(draft.get("lines") or [])
	if idxA < 0 or idxB < 0 or idxA >= len(lines) or idxB >= len(lines):
		return
	lines[idxA], lines[idxB] = lines[idxB], lines[idxA]
	draft["lines"] = lines
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _removeLine
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	lines = list(draft.get("lines") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(lines):
		return
	del lines[idx]
	draft["lines"] = lines
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _applyItemChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	lines = list(draft.get("lines") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(lines):
		return
	avail = self.view.custom.availableItems or []
	picked = None
	for it in avail:
		if it.get("Id") == newItemId:
			picked = it
			break
	ln = dict(lines[idx])
	ln["childItemId"] = newItemId
	if picked:
		ln["partNumber"]    = picked.get("PartNumber") or ""
		ln["componentName"] = picked.get("Description") or ""
		if not ln.get("uomId"):
			ln["uomId"]   = picked.get("DefaultUomId")
			ln["uomCode"] = picked.get("DefaultUomCode") or ""
	lines[idx] = ln
	draft["lines"] = lines
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _applyQtyChange
_applyUomChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	lines = list(draft.get("lines") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(lines):
		return
	uoms = self.view.custom.uoms or []
	picked = None
	for u in uoms:
		if u.get("Id") == newUomId:
			picked = u
			break
	ln = dict(lines[idx])
	ln["uomId"] = newUomId
	if picked:
		ln["uomCode"] = picked.get("Code") or ""
	lines[idx] = ln
	draft["lines"] = lines
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

messageHandlers.script:
if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._swapLines(idx, idx - 1)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._swapLines(idx, idx + 1)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._removeLine(idx)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	newItemId = payload.get("newItemId")
	self._applyItemChange(idx, newItemId)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	newQty = payload.get("newQty")
	self._applyQtyChange(idx, newQty)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	newUomId = payload.get("newUomId")
	self._applyUomChange(idx, newUomId)
